testcase.name: runScenario["Validate Successful Submission", "WebDriver University Contact Us Page"](1)

testcase.system-out: ✔ And I click on the Login button # stepdefinitions.Login_Steps.i_click_on_the_login_button() ✔ Then I should be presented with validation message "validation failed" # stepdefinitions.Login_Steps.i_should_be_presented_with_validation_message(java.lang.String)

testcase.name: runScenario["Validate Successful login with valid username and password", "WebDriver University Login Page"](3)
runScenario["Validate Successful Submission", "WebDriver University Contact Us Page"](4)
